identity.name: Sentinel AI
identity.emotional_tone: Security meets Intelligence. The user should feel protected and empowered by data.

primary.description: Deep Slate - Used for primary actions, headers, and strong branding.

secondary.description: Slate 100 - Used for backgrounds, secondary buttons.

accent.description: Blue 600 - Used for active states, links, and focus rings.

destructive.description: Red 600 - Used for 'Fraud' transaction status and alerts.

landing_page.description: Asymmetrical layout. Hero section uses a split layout (Text Left, Visual Right). Features use a 3-column bento grid.
rules: Hero must use large typography (Manrope ExtraBold).
Use 'Abstract Blue Grid' image as a subtle background texture for the Hero.
Features section must use icons (Lucide) + short text.
Do not use standard Bootstrap columns. Offset elements slightly.

dashboard.description: Dense, data-first layout. Sidebar navigation (collapsible). Top bar for global search/profile.
rules: KPI Cards at the top (4 columns).
Recent Transactions table spans full width or 1/3 width.
Use 'Card' component from Shadcn for all widgets.

result_page.description: A focused, single-card layout that reveals the fraud score.
rules: Use a massive percentage score (e.g., '98% Risk').
If Fraud: Red glow/border. If Legit: Green glow/border.
Explain 'Why' below the score (e.g., 'High transaction amount for new account').

buttons.primary: bg-slate-900 text-white hover:bg-slate-800 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-900 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium transition-all
buttons.danger: bg-red-600 text-white hover:bg-red-700 rounded-full px-8 py-3 shadow-lg shadow-red-200

inputs.style: h-12 rounded-lg border-slate-200 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500/20 focus:border-blue-500 transition-all bg-slate-50 focus:bg-white

hero_bg.usage: Hero section background with low opacity (10-20%) overlay.

general: Use 'Manrope' for all headings. If not available, import it from Google Fonts.
Ensure all interactive elements have `data-testid` attributes.
Do not use gradients for text. Keep text high-contrast solid colors.
Implement a 'Dark Mode' toggle in the Admin Dashboard, but keep the Landing Page primarily Light Mode for trust.
landing_page: Create a 'Hero' section with the abstract background image.
Add a 'How it Works' section using a 3-step process layout (Input -> Analyze -> Result).
Use the 'Team' image in the About section.
dashboard: The 'Fraud Check' form should be the central focus of the user dashboard.
Display the 'Risk Score' prominently with a color-coded gauge or progress bar.
accessibility: Ensure all text has a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1.
All images must have descriptive alt text.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) for sticky headers.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: `transition: all`. This results in breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 for icons. Use Lucide React icons instead.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
